storyInfo: Doctor and Mon3tr learn from Ksenia, who attempted suicide but survived, about a suspected Royal Guard murder. The party once again formulates their plan of action and decides to split into two. A few days ago, the miners used their chips as bait and ambushed the Patrol Unit.

attributes.content: <p=1>Central Far North Mining District Laboratory, Ursus</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.content: Did she just say... 'Royal Guard'?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.options: I heard her say...;Kill the Royal Guard, even.

attributes.content: So she means... the substance called 'Oka' killed the Royal Guard?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Is that possible? A sort of demonic product even scarier than their Dominion?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.options: An unidentified substance discovered from the mines.;Used by researchers to experiment on both Infected and non-Infected.
Results proved to worsen Oripathy symptoms.

attributes.content: Maybe, it's just a special name for a substance? We can't come to a conclusion before we've seen it ourselves.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Ksenia, Ksenia! Look at me, can you remember anything?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: I... you're...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Mon3tr thinks this attempt will be as fruitless as the last, but the woman's glazed eyes suddenly pop wide open.
She immediately clutches the clothes before her, pulling Mon3tr close.
You're—the Director? Director Kal'tsit?
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Did you come here for me? I want to go back, I want to see the professor—
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: I want to see Professor Ilia... and Lyuda... ugh...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: But they... I don't think they'll want to see me, right? A coward like me who couldn't do anything... Do I still deserve to see them?
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Uwa...ahhh—aaaahh!!!
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: However, the woman does not wait for Mon3tr to respond before releasing her grip, and returns to her prior position on the floor.
No, something's off...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: You're not the Director. I never saw her again, just like the others. She wouldn't be here.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: I even saw those who came after her, and they... they...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: They? Who did you see? Was one of them a short Liberi who's always smiling?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Liberi... yes, I've seen her.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Where did she go?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: I don't know...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: The group that killed the Royal Guard... She was with those Infected.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: They'll die! Everyone will die!
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Ugh... I don't know—I don't know...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: So the information we've been getting—
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.options: The miners' escape is related to the Royal Guard.;Mantra mentioned that the contamination caused by the Royal Guard' is spreading south.

attributes.content: But... did the Royal Guard really get killed? By a bunch of miners? How's that possible?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.options: Perhaps we should consider...;What it means if it is indeed real.

attributes.content: The Grand Duchess actually locked the mines down to cover up the fact that a Royal Guard died in her domain?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: But that's impossible! Be it the Tsar or the Armies, they won't let the matter die so easily. If she was really trying to cover it up, she wouldn't have agreed to let us in from the start.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Does that Imperial Guard know about this too?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.options: That's right...;That is exactly what we need to consider.
Let's contact Mantra and Amiya first.

attributes.content: Roger, Doctor.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Likewise, we have made progress here that coheres to your information.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: There are traces of fighting, and some medical equipment lying around.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Rhodes Island standard issue.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: We'll meet you ASAP.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Understood... Doctor.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: We'll be right there.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: What is it? Have your companions discovered something?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: I'm afraid we can only explain after we regroup.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Eloysius, are there any other leads here we should be aware of?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: There are limits to what I know, and I can't draw any more useful conclusions. If needed, it would be acceptable to let your Doctor come here to investigate.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Though, this only makes me even more certain the Army has no moral baseline whatsoever...
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Could I ask if you know anything else about what happened in the mines?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Hm? What do you want to know? The experiments conducted here, or something about the mutated Infected?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: What's wrong?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Amiya has always resisted using her powers in such situations and in such a manner, but still she tries to probe the Imperial Guard's mind.
Eloysius's head shows only her hazy doubts, and no guilty conscience.
Nothing. Let's go.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Doctor, these papers... and the suicide note. What should we do with them?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.options: This note barely mentions the Sarcophagus.;That Guardswoman gave us information, so we should repay the favor.

attributes.content: Is it over here? What a quest...
attributes.name: Nearby Voice

attributes.content: Oh, I'm sure there's a secret or two buried here, searching this deep—
attributes.name: Nearby Voice

attributes.content: —Wait, who is this?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: The Guardswoman's gaze rests on the pale-faced woman leaning against the wall, eyes shut.
A researcher who didn't evacuate. Her name is Ksenia.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: We wanted to ask her if she's seen our friends, since the researchers should have bumped into our mobile medical team, but she's been in a daze and is severely dehydrated, so it's unwise to press her.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: And these candles and wires on the ground...?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: My guess is, her attempt to take her own life. Doctor, what exactly happened here?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.options: We came just in time to prevent an explosion.;The situation is complex.

attributes.content: And what are those papers in your hand?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.options: A suicide note. You should take a look.;(Hand it to her)

attributes.content: A researcher who achieved nothing, a mysterious substance called 'Oka'... and human experimentation.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: It seems the dead we saw down below were killed by this 'Oka'.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: They were really conducting human experiments here?
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: Damn, I was just making an offhand remark back there—
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: (Shakes head)
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Hmph, I see the Grand Duchess has truly hidden many things.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: But what was the point of the experiment? I'm not surprised the researchers resorted to such base methods, but they should have had some sort of goal!
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: And this researcher? Hasn't said anything?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.options: It seems like some research materials have been destroyed on purpose.;But it's unclear if that was done by the miners or researchers.

attributes.content: So, we still don't know how those mutated Infected came about.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Though, we know now at least that the miners who were still alive have escaped, and save for this one researcher, they're the only clue to cracking this case.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.options: The Infected miners left after ransacking the place.;They went south. Our only clue.

attributes.content: We should hurry... How long will it take, until this researcher is well enough to field questions?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Hard to tell. She's severely dehydrated, and in a pretty bad state too, so we should prioritize her recovery.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: What a pain...
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: We don't know how long it's been since they left, but we should grab the chance to catch up, since we know where they went.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Though, there's no way we can bring this woman along with us who can't even move on her own.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.options: Mon3tr and I will stay here to look after Ksenia.;The rest of you, go after the miners.

attributes.content: Ah... Are you sure you want to stay here by yourselves?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: It is your choice, but I still have to remind you.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: No one knows what's going on with the mines in the Far North, so no one can guarantee your safety.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.options: You can trust in Amiya's command.

attributes.content: Doctor?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.options: You can do it, Amiya.;Trust your own judgment.

attributes.content: I will go with Amiya.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Doctor, I hope your efforts prove fruitful.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.options: Once Ksenia can move again, we'll come find you.;Signal should gradually improve upon leaving the contaminated zone.

attributes.content: So it's settled.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Doctor, if the signal doesn't improve, we'll come back here after we find the miners to regroup with you.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: (Nods)
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Very good then, that is our backup plan. Let us hurry now.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: <p=1>Central Far North Mining District, Ursus</> <p=2>Three days ago...</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.content: Over here... hurry!
attributes.name: Excited Patrol Unit

attributes.content: Gah, what's the rush? This lousy positioning system works only half the time, it might not even be here.
attributes.name: Doubtful Patrol Unit

attributes.content: Last time it was a burdenbeast that escaped just to find some grass to chomp on, and this thing only sent a signal to the outpost after it ran more than ten miles away. How do you know if it won't be the same this time?
attributes.name: Doubtful Patrol Unit

attributes.content: Technically, no one should be at the south exit, since it's been sealed for a long time—
attributes.name: Lax Patrol Unit

attributes.content: Huh? How did you get here from over there?
attributes.name: Doubtful Patrol Unit

attributes.content: No, you're not even a member of our squad. What are you doing here?
attributes.name: Doubtful Patrol Unit

attributes.content: That's my question to ask. This area isn't under your jurisdiction, is it?
attributes.name: Lax Patrol Unit

attributes.content: It's past the time to care who's covering where. The one who gets the news and catches the runaway Infected first gets the credit.
attributes.name: Doubtful Patrol Unit

attributes.content: Now get lost. You're in my way.
attributes.name: Doubtful Patrol Unit

attributes.content: According to you, I was here first, so the credit goes to my squad, no?
attributes.name: Lax Patrol Unit

attributes.content: Whoever finds those gavno first gets the credit.
attributes.name: Doubtful Patrol Unit

attributes.content: What are you doing, Tosha? Stop wasting your time with him and continue your search.
attributes.name: Patrol Unit Captain

attributes.content: Over here! They're all hiding—Hahahahaaahaha!
attributes.name: Excited Patrol Unit

attributes.content: What did he find to laugh like that?
attributes.name: Doubtful Patrol Unit

attributes.content: Go and see.
attributes.name: Patrol Unit Captain

attributes.content: There's a hole up ahead, and they're just huddled in there, thinking we wouldn't find them—
attributes.name: Excited Patrol Unit

attributes.content: O bozhe moy, hahahahahahaha... this is too funny.
attributes.name: Excited Patrol Unit

attributes.content: Heh. Did they think it was a trench?
attributes.name: Patrol Unit Captain

attributes.content: Tosha, Gesha. Take everyone and drag those burdenbeast brains out here.
attributes.name: Patrol Unit Captain

attributes.content: The positioning data show there are quite a few of those runaway Infected miners. Do you need our help?
attributes.name: Lax Patrol Unit

attributes.content: How many heads are in your squad?
attributes.name: Patrol Unit Captain

attributes.content: We're a small one. Just six of us.
attributes.name: Lax Patrol Unit

attributes.content: That's a big group.
attributes.name: Patrol Unit Captain

attributes.content: If you say so. We're the only two remaining idle squads around here, and we got here first.
attributes.name: Lax Patrol Unit

attributes.content: So you have to share the spoils even if you don't want to.
attributes.name: Lax Patrol Unit

attributes.content: What—
attributes.name: Lax Patrol Unit

attributes.content: Arrrggghhh!!!
attributes.name: Excited Patrol Unit

attributes.content: A shrill shriek breaks off the stale standoff.
Sounds of struggle and bones broken by blunt instruments immediately follow.
What's going on—
attributes.name: Patrol Unit Captain

attributes.content: Help! Save me! They've gone mad—
attributes.name: Excited Patrol Unit

attributes.content: Blyat! These Infected are all crazy!
attributes.name: Excited Patrol Unit

attributes.content: You're not wrong...
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: You'll witness both the wrath and madness of the Infected.
attributes.name: Rankin
